input_basis: all eligible <=150 kyr samples after damaged prokaryote filtering and taxon-centered CLR
sample_balance_handling: does not equalize core sample counts; ST8 is 60.8% of training samples
main_strength: uses all available information and currently supports downstream HMM/driver biology
main_risk: stability may partially reflect repeated ST8-heavy covariance structure

input_basis: diagnostic variants around current input plus low-detection/ST8/core-age imbalance checks
sample_balance_handling: diagnoses imbalance and tests sensitivity but is not the promoted network builder
main_strength: identifies whether depth, low-detection, and ST8 structure threaten interpretation
main_risk: diagnostic rather than a complete alternative network decision by itself
decision_role: evidence layer for whether original input assumptions are safe

input_basis: same stage1 matrix, then age-bin/core-balanced training subset
sample_balance_handling: equalizes training cores within shared age bins; ST8 is 33.3% of balanced training samples
main_strength: directly tests whether modules survive after removing ST8 sample-count dominance
main_risk: higher grey burden and smaller training set may discard real information
